examples: The FJP is in a coalition with smaller parties, and overall that coalition is expected to receive about 40%.
The FJP won more than 36% of the party list vote during the first round of elections in late November.
Egypt's ruling Freedom and Justice Party (FJP) has accused the US of "interference" after it criticised legal action against a TV satirist.
